LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS JULIA BRIGDEN AND MICHAEL BRIGDEN'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT. HEARING HELD AND ARGUED, AND THE COURT RULES THAT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT IS DISMISSED. THE COURT FURTHER RULES, THAT PETITIONERS' REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS, ARE DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT IN ADDITION, RULES THAT PETITIONERS' REQUEST THAT DEFENDANT, KIT COLE, POST THE REQUIRED ARBITRATION FEES AND DEPOSITS, IS ALSO, DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PETITIONERS' COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion To Strike Respondent'S Untimely Papers In Opposition To Osc Re: Contempt
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS JULIA BRIGDEN AND MICHAEL BRIGDEN'S Motion To Strike Respondent's Untimely Papers In Opposition To OSC Re: Contempt. Appearances: Richard Idell, Esq., and Ory Sandel, Esq. of Idell & Seitel LLP, (415) 986-2400, appearing for Petitioners, and moving parties; Thomas F. Hyde, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 464-1180, appearing for Respondent, Kit Cole, and opposing party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: MOTION TO STRIKE UNTIMELY PAPERS IN OPPOSITION IS DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS JULIA BRIGDEN AND MICHAEL BRIGDEN'S Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt (302/CWW/VC). Appearances: Richard Idell, Esq., and Ory Sandel, Esq. of Idell & Seitel LLP, (415) 986-2400, appearing for Petitioners, and moving parties; Thomas F. Hyde, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 464-1180, appearing for Respondent, Kit Cole, and opposing party. There are no other appearances. Hearing held and argued, and the Court rules that the Order to Show Cause re: Contempt is dismissed. The Court further rules, that Petitioners' request for attorney's fees and costs, are denied without prejudice. The Court in addition, rules that Petitioners' request that Defendant, Kit Cole, post the required arbitration fees and deposits, is also, denied without prejudice. Petitioners' counsel to prepare Order for the Court's signature. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That All Intra-Family Claims Be Arbitrated Together In One Arbitration Proceeding
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER STEPHEN WELKOM, DANETTE WELKOM, STEPHEN WELCOM AND DANETTE WELCOM'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT ALL INTRA-FAMILY CLAIMS BE ARBITRATED TOGETHER IN ONE ARBITRATION PROCEEDING.
APPEARANCES: RICHARD IDELL, ESQUIRE (415.986.2400) APPEARING FOR PETITIONER. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: COURT DENIES THE REQUEST TO TRANSFER THE MATTER TO JUDGE QUIDACHAY. GRANT REQUEST TO CONSOLIDATE INTRA-FAMILY CLAIMS. THIS A DISTINCT ISSUE FROM THE ISSUE ADDRESSED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY. DENY REQUEST RE DISCOVERY FOR THAT IS TO BE ADDRESSED IN THE ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
